since_last: 43% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.56%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.30% · BTC +1.27% · Gold -0.39% · Nasdaq100 +0.34%. 43% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.56%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.56%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +15.46%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +15.46%, META +5.08%, NVDA +3.67%, UEC +3.44%, AMAT +2.93%. Laggards: RXRX -5.98%, MDB -5.76%, OKTA -5.76%, CRWD -5.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.40% at $148.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.40% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
